name: ema_crossover
description: Trades momentum shifts when the fast EMA crosses the slow EMA.
entry_rules: BUY when fast EMA crosses above slow EMA
SELL when fast EMA crosses below slow EMA
Skip directional entries when the market regime is choppy
exit_rules: Allow opposing signal or protective levels to close the trade
research_notes: The learning engine may tune EMA values over time.
This card should be updated when the tuned EMA baseline changes materially.
